name: Tayo and Little Wizards
overview: Tayo and the little buses get caught in between the battle of wizards in the human world, the evil wizards disappear with lttle buses. Tayo, who is left alone, travel to the magical world with Carly, Bird, and Gray. There, Tayo meets a little wizard named Luna and together, they enter the magic school to learn magic to save his friends. Join Tayo on a magical adventure in a new world!
